description: CRITICAL: ALWAYS call this tool - NEVER make up, guess, or fabricate data. Assign one or more contacts to an EXISTING tag. IMPORTANT: (1) Call tags_get_summary with tagName parameter FIRST to verify tag exists. (2) You only need PHONE NUMBERS to assign contacts - DO NOT call contacts_find first. Use the phone numbers directly from user input or from contacts_add response. (3) Include ALL contacts in a SINGLE call - DO NOT make separate calls for each contact. Use this tool directly only when a single call to this tool is sufficient to complete the user's request; for any sequence of two or more tool calls, use the `batch_action` tool instead.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

tagName.description: Name of an EXISTING tag to assign contacts to. Call tags_get_summary with this tagName first to verify exists=true.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number - use directly from user input or contacts_add response. DO NOT call contacts_find to get this.

contacts.description: Array of contacts to assign. Only phoneNumber is required - use phone numbers directly, no need to look up contacts first. Include ALL contacts in this single array.
